ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the car */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the car model was produced */,
  "car_type" TEXT /* Type of car (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "car_description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "chassis_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each physical car */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the car was produced */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the car model has been discontinued */,
  "car_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the car model */,
  "car_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the car model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the performance data belongs to */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (city) */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (highway) */,
  "acceleration_time" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the car in mph */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the car in lb-ft */,
  "mpg_combined" REAL /* Combined fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "acceleration_0_to_100" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in seconds */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the car in miles on a full tank */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., RWD, FWD, AWD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the emissions data belongs to */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in g/km */,
  "nox_emissions" REAL /* NOx emissions in g/km */,
  "pm_emissions" REAL /* Particulate matter emissions in g/km */,
  "passed_emissions" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the car passed emissions tests */,
  "co_emissions" REAL /* CO emissions in g/km */,
  "ch4_emissions" REAL /* CH4 emissions in g/km */,
  "nh3_emissions" REAL /* NH3 emissions in g/km */,
  "emissions_certificate_number" TEXT /* Unique certificate number for emissions compliance */,
  "emissions_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the emissions test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specifications" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the engine specifications belong to */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the engine in cubic inches */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V8, V6) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "horsepower_rpm" INTEGER /* RPM at which maximum horsepower is achieved */,
  "torque_rpm" INTEGER /* RPM at which maximum torque is achieved */,
  "engine_material" TEXT /* Material used in the engine construction */,
  "camshaft_type" TEXT /* Type of camshaft used */,
  "redline_rpm" INTEGER /* Redline RPM of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specifications_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the dimensions belong to */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the car in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the car in meters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the car in meters */,
  "wheelbase" REAL /* Wheelbase of the car in meters */,
  "track_width" REAL /* Track width of the car in meters */,
  "ground_clearance" REAL /* Ground clearance in meters */,
  "front_track_width" REAL /* Track width at the front in meters */,
  "rear_track_width" REAL /* Track width at the rear in meters */,
  "interior_volume" REAL /* Interior volume in cubic meters */,
  "trunk_volume" REAL /* Trunk volume in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_dimensions_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the weight data belongs to */,
  "curb_weight" REAL /* Curb weight of the car in kilograms */,
  "gross_vehicle_weight" REAL /* Gross vehicle weight in kilograms */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Payload capacity of the car in kilograms */,
  "towing_capacity" REAL /* Towing capacity of the car in kilograms */,
  "kerb_weight" REAL /* Kerb weight of the car in kilograms */,
  "unladen_weight" REAL /* Unladen weight of the car in kilograms */,
  "gross_combined_weight" REAL /* Gross combined weight in kilograms */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., Compact, Mid-size, Luxury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_weights_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., Safety, Comfort, Technology) */,
  "feature_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the feature */,
  "feature_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the feature */,
  "feature_cost" REAL /* Cost of the feature in USD */,
  "feature_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the feature (e.g., Standard, Optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., R&D, Marketing, Sales) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the car model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the car model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., Office, Home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the compliance report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance report (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "report_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the compliance report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the compliance report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the compliance report */,
  "report_department" TEXT /* Department that generated the compliance report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience of the compliance report (e.g., Internal, Regulatory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing material */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing material (e.g., Brochure, Video) */,
  "material_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the marketing material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "material_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the marketing material */,
  "material_author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the marketing material */,
  "material_department" TEXT /* Department that created the marketing material */,
  "material_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience of the marketing material (e.g., Consumers, Dealers) */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Cost of producing the marketing material in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_materials_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)
